title: Storyboard cold-start DEV dashboard + backend mode
description: Reusable fast cold-start health contract for bc-storyboard onboarding through the ddev dashboard remote-storyboard route and a parameterized BaseConnect frontend backend mode (staging or docker). Emits recursive grouped health nodes with shared subcheck definition ids and backend-specific branches.

execution.source: dashboard server initiating delegated cross-surface probes
